rows.desc_en: Fetch a single resource by its ID. This operationId is shared by three endpoints: get a thread (with its full message list) by `thread_id`, get a draft by `draft_id`, and get one allow/block list entry by `direction`/`type`/`entry`. The path determines which resource and response shape you receive.
rows.title_zh: 按 ID 获取单个资源。该 operationId 由三个端点共用：按 `thread_id` 获取对话（含完整消息列表）、按 `draft_id` 获取草稿、按 `direction`/`type`/`entry` 获取单条允许/拦截名单条目。具体取哪种资源及返回结构由请求路径决定。

rows.desc_en: ID of the thread to fetch. Obtain it from the `thread_id` field of a list-threads result or a send/reply response.
rows.title_zh: 要获取的对话 ID。可从列出对话的结果或发送/回复响应的 `thread_id` 字段获得。

rows.desc_en: Bearer token for authentication, sent as `Bearer <api_key>`. Keep the key secret; never log it in plaintext.
rows.title_zh: 用于鉴权的 Bearer 令牌，格式为 `Bearer <api_key>`。请妥善保密，切勿明文记录。

rows.desc_en: ID of the inbox that owns this resource.
rows.title_zh: 拥有该资源的收件箱 ID。

rows.desc_en: ID of the thread, usable as the path parameter for thread operations.
rows.title_zh: 对话 ID，可用作对话相关操作的路径参数。

rows.desc_en: Labels currently applied, including both system labels and your custom labels.
rows.title_zh: 当前应用的标签，含系统标签与自定义标签。

rows.desc_en: When the last message was sent or received in the thread.
rows.title_zh: 对话中最近一次发送或接收消息的时间。

rows.desc_en: When the last message was received in the thread.
rows.title_zh: 对话中最近一次接收消息的时间。

rows.desc_en: When the last message was sent in the thread.
rows.title_zh: 对话中最近一次发送消息的时间。

rows.desc_en: Distinct sender addresses appearing in the thread.
rows.title_zh: 对话中出现过的不同发件人地址。

rows.desc_en: Distinct recipient addresses appearing in the thread.
rows.title_zh: 对话中出现过的不同收件人地址。

rows.desc_en: Subject line.
rows.title_zh: 主题。

rows.desc_en: Short plain-text snippet of the content, for list-style display.
rows.title_zh: 内容的纯文本短摘要，用于列表展示。

rows.desc_en: Attachments belonging to this resource.
rows.title_zh: 该资源包含的附件。

rows.desc_en: ID of the attachment, used as the path parameter for the get-attachment endpoint.
rows.title_zh: 附件 ID，作为获取附件端点的路径参数。

rows.desc_en: Original filename of the attachment.
rows.title_zh: 附件的原始文件名。

rows.desc_en: Attachment size in bytes.
rows.title_zh: 附件大小（字节）。

rows.desc_en: MIME content type of the attachment (e.g. `application/pdf`).
rows.title_zh: 附件的 MIME 内容类型（如 `application/pdf`）。

rows.desc_en: How the attachment is presented: `inline` (rendered within the body, e.g. an embedded image) or `attachment` (a downloadable file).
rows.title_zh: 附件呈现方式：`inline`（随正文内嵌，如内嵌图片）或 `attachment`（可下载的文件）。

rows.desc_en: Content-ID used to reference an inline attachment from within the HTML body (via `cid:`).
rows.title_zh: Content-ID，用于在 HTML 正文中以 `cid:` 引用内嵌附件。

rows.desc_en: ID of the most recent message in the thread.
rows.title_zh: 对话中最新一条消息的 ID。

rows.desc_en: Number of messages in the thread.
rows.title_zh: 对话中的消息数量。

rows.desc_en: Total size of the thread in bytes.
rows.title_zh: 对话的总大小（字节）。

rows.desc_en: When the resource was last updated.
rows.title_zh: 资源最后更新时间。

rows.desc_en: When the resource was created.
rows.title_zh: 资源创建时间。

rows.src_en: Messages in thread. Ordered by `timestamp` ascending.
rows.desc_en: Full messages of the thread in chronological order, each with bodies and attachments.
rows.title_zh: 对话内的完整消息，按时间先后排列，每条含正文与附件。

rows.desc_en: ID of the inbox that owns this message.
rows.title_zh: 拥有该消息的收件箱 ID。

rows.desc_en: ID of the thread this message belongs to.
rows.title_zh: 该消息所属的对话 ID。

rows.desc_en: ID of the message.
rows.title_zh: 消息 ID。

rows.desc_en: Labels applied to this message.
rows.title_zh: 应用于该消息的标签。

rows.desc_en: When the message was sent or drafted.
rows.title_zh: 消息发送或起草的时间。

rows.desc_en: Sender address of the message.
rows.title_zh: 消息发件人地址。

rows.src_en: Reply-to addresses. In format `username@domain.com` or `Display Name <username@domain.com>`.
rows.desc_en: Reply-To addresses for this message.
rows.title_zh: 该消息的回复目标地址。

rows.desc_en: Primary recipient addresses of the message.
rows.title_zh: 消息的主要收件人地址。

rows.desc_en: CC recipient addresses of the message.
rows.title_zh: 消息的抄送收件人地址。

rows.desc_en: BCC recipient addresses of the message.
rows.title_zh: 消息的密送收件人地址。

rows.desc_en: Subject of the message.
rows.title_zh: 消息主题。

rows.desc_en: Short plain-text snippet of the message.
rows.title_zh: 消息的纯文本短摘要。

rows.desc_en: Plain-text body of the message, including any quoted history.
rows.title_zh: 消息的纯文本正文，含引用的历史内容。

rows.desc_en: HTML body of the message, including any quoted history.
rows.title_zh: 消息的 HTML 正文，含引用的历史内容。

rows.desc_en: Just the newly written plain text of the message, with quoted reply history stripped out.
rows.title_zh: 仅该消息新写入的纯文本，已剔除引用的回复历史。

rows.desc_en: Just the newly written HTML of the message, with quoted reply history stripped out.
rows.title_zh: 仅该消息新写入的 HTML，已剔除引用的回复历史。

rows.desc_en: Attachments of this message.
rows.title_zh: 该消息的附件。

rows.desc_en: ID of the attachment, used as the path parameter for the get-attachment endpoint.
rows.title_zh: 附件 ID，作为获取附件端点的路径参数。

rows.desc_en: Original filename of the attachment.
rows.title_zh: 附件的原始文件名。

rows.desc_en: Attachment size in bytes.
rows.title_zh: 附件大小（字节）。

rows.desc_en: MIME content type of the attachment (e.g. `application/pdf`).
rows.title_zh: 附件的 MIME 内容类型（如 `application/pdf`）。

rows.desc_en: How the attachment is presented: `inline` (rendered within the body, e.g. an embedded image) or `attachment` (a downloadable file).
rows.title_zh: 附件呈现方式：`inline`（随正文内嵌，如内嵌图片）或 `attachment`（可下载的文件）。

rows.desc_en: Content-ID used to reference an inline attachment from within the HTML body (via `cid:`).
rows.title_zh: Content-ID，用于在 HTML 正文中以 `cid:` 引用内嵌附件。

rows.desc_en: ID of the message this one replies to.
rows.title_zh: 该消息所回复的目标消息 ID。

rows.desc_en: IDs of earlier messages in the thread, forming the reply chain.
rows.title_zh: 对话中较早消息的 ID，构成回复链。

rows.desc_en: Raw email headers of the message as key-value pairs.
rows.title_zh: 消息的原始邮件头，以键值对表示。

rows.desc_en: Message size in bytes.
rows.title_zh: 消息大小（字节）。

rows.desc_en: When the message was last updated.
rows.title_zh: 消息最后更新时间。

rows.desc_en: When the message was created.
rows.title_zh: 消息创建时间。

rows.desc_en: Machine-readable error name identifying the failure.
rows.title_zh: 标识此次失败的机器可读错误名。

rows.desc_en: Human-readable description of the error.
rows.title_zh: 面向人类的错误描述。

rows.src_en:
Moves the thread to trash by adding a trash label to all messages. If the thread is already in trash, it will be permanently deleted. Use `permanent=true` to force permanent deletion.

**CLI:**
```bash
agentmail threads delete --thread-id <thread_id>
```
rows.desc_en: Delete a resource by its ID. Shared by two endpoints: delete a thread (moves it to trash, or permanently removes it when already trashed or when `permanent=true`) and delete one allow/block list entry. Read-only system entries cannot be deleted.
rows.title_zh: 按 ID 删除资源。由两个端点共用：删除对话（移入回收站；若已在回收站或 `permanent=true` 则永久删除）、删除单条允许/拦截名单条目。只读的系统条目无法删除。

rows.desc_en: ID of the thread to delete (trash, or permanently delete if already trashed or `permanent=true`).
rows.title_zh: 要删除的对话 ID（移入回收站；若已在回收站或 `permanent=true` 则永久删除）。

rows.src_en: If true, permanently delete the thread instead of moving to trash.
rows.desc_en: When true, permanently delete the thread immediately instead of moving it to trash.
rows.title_zh: 为 true 时立即永久删除对话，而非移入回收站。

rows.desc_en: Bearer token for authentication, sent as `Bearer <api_key>`. Keep the key secret.
rows.title_zh: 用于鉴权的 Bearer 令牌，格式为 `Bearer <api_key>`。请妥善保密。

rows.desc_en: Machine-readable error name identifying the failure.
rows.title_zh: 标识此次失败的机器可读错误名。

rows.desc_en: Human-readable description of the error.
rows.title_zh: 面向人类的错误描述。

rows.src_en: Updates thread labels. Cannot add or remove system labels (sent, received, bounced, etc.). Rejects requests with a `422` for threads with 100 or more messages.
rows.desc_en: Update a thread's labels by adding and/or removing custom labels. System labels (sent, received, bounced, etc.) cannot be changed, and threads with 100 or more messages are rejected with 422.
rows.title_zh: 更新对话标签：增加和/或移除自定义标签。系统标签（sent、received、bounced 等）不可改动；消息数达 100 条及以上的对话会以 422 拒绝。

rows.desc_en: ID of the thread whose labels are being updated.
rows.title_zh: 要更新标签的对话 ID。

rows.desc_en: Bearer token for authentication, sent as `Bearer <api_key>`. Keep the key secret.
rows.title_zh: 用于鉴权的 Bearer 令牌，格式为 `Bearer <api_key>`。请妥善保密。

rows.src_en: Labels to add to thread. Cannot be system labels.
rows.desc_en: Custom labels to apply to the thread. System labels are not allowed.
rows.title_zh: 要为对话添加的自定义标签。不允许使用系统标签。

rows.src_en: Labels to remove from thread. Cannot be system labels. Takes priority over `add_labels` (in the event of duplicate labels passed in).
rows.desc_en: Custom labels to remove from the thread. System labels are not allowed. If the same label appears in both lists, removal wins.
rows.title_zh: 要从对话移除的自定义标签。不允许使用系统标签。若同一标签同时出现在两个列表，以移除为准。

rows.desc_en: ID of the updated thread.
rows.title_zh: 已更新对话的 ID。

rows.desc_en: The thread's complete label set after the update.
rows.title_zh: 更新后对话的完整标签集合。

rows.desc_en: Machine-readable error name identifying the validation failure.
rows.title_zh: 标识本次校验失败的机器可读错误名。

rows.desc_en: Details of the validation problems with the query parameters.
rows.title_zh: 查询参数校验问题的明细。

rows.desc_en: Machine-readable error name identifying the failure.
rows.title_zh: 标识此次失败的机器可读错误名。

rows.desc_en: Human-readable description of the error.
rows.title_zh: 面向人类的错误描述。

rows.desc_en: Machine-readable error name identifying the failure.
rows.title_zh: 标识此次失败的机器可读错误名。

rows.desc_en: Human-readable description of the error.
rows.title_zh: 面向人类的错误描述。

rows.desc_en: List resources with cursor pagination. This operationId is shared by three endpoints: list threads, list drafts, and list allow/block list entries. Supports time/label filters where applicable; iterate with `next_page_token` to walk all pages.
rows.title_zh: 分页列出资源（基于游标）。该 operationId 由三个端点共用：列出对话、列出草稿、列出允许/拦截名单条目。在适用处支持时间与标签筛选；通过 `next_page_token` 翻页可遍历全部结果。

rows.desc_en: Traffic direction of the list to read: `send`, `receive`, or `reply`. (List-entries endpoint only.)
rows.title_zh: 要读取的名单流量方向：`send`、`receive` 或 `reply`。（仅名单条目端点）

rows.desc_en: Whether to read the `allow` or `block` list. (List-entries endpoint only.)
rows.title_zh: 读取 `allow` 还是 `block` 名单。（仅名单条目端点）

rows.desc_en: Maximum number of items to return in this page.
rows.title_zh: 本页返回的最大条目数。

rows.desc_en: Pagination cursor. Pass the `next_page_token` from the previous response to fetch the next page; omit for the first page.
rows.title_zh: 分页游标。传入上一次响应的 `next_page_token` 以取下一页；首页可不传。

rows.desc_en: Bearer token for authentication, sent as `Bearer <api_key>`. Keep the key secret.
rows.title_zh: 用于鉴权的 Bearer 令牌，格式为 `Bearer <api_key>`。请妥善保密。

rows.desc_en: Number of items returned in this page.
rows.title_zh: 本页返回的条目数。

rows.desc_en: The limit that was applied to this page.
rows.title_zh: 本页实际生效的数量上限。

rows.desc_en: Cursor for the next page; pass it back as `page_token`. Absent or empty when there are no more pages.
rows.title_zh: 下一页的游标；作为 `page_token` 回传。无更多页时缺省或为空。

rows.desc_en: The page of allow/block list entries, ordered by entry ascending.
rows.title_zh: 本页允许/拦截名单条目，按条目升序排列。

rows.src_en: Email address or domain of list entry.
rows.desc_en: The email address or domain of the list entry.
rows.title_zh: 名单条目的邮箱地址或域名。

rows.desc_en: ID of the organization the list entry belongs to.
rows.title_zh: 名单条目所属的组织 ID。

rows.desc_en: Free-text reason recorded when the entry was added.
rows.title_zh: 添加该条目时记录的自由文本原因。

rows.desc_en: Traffic direction the entry governs: `send`, `receive`, or `reply`.
rows.title_zh: 条目作用的流量方向：`send`、`receive` 或 `reply`。

rows.desc_en: Whether this is an `allow` or `block` list entry.
rows.title_zh: 该条目属于 `allow` 还是 `block` 名单。

rows.desc_en: Whether the entry matches a single `email` address or an entire `domain`.
rows.title_zh: 条目匹配单个 `email` 地址还是整个 `domain`。

rows.src_en: Time at which entry was created.
rows.desc_en: When the resource was created.
rows.title_zh: 资源创建时间。

rows.src_en: Whether the entry is read-only and cannot be deleted via the API.
rows.desc_en: When true, the entry is system-managed and cannot be deleted through the API.
rows.title_zh: 为 true 时，条目由系统管理，不能通过 API 删除。

rows.desc_en: Add an email address or domain to an allow/block list, scoped by the `direction` and `type` path parameters. Returns the created entry.
rows.title_zh: 向允许/拦截名单新增一个邮箱地址或域名，作用范围由路径参数 `direction` 与 `type` 决定。返回新建的条目。

rows.desc_en: Traffic direction the new entry should govern: `send`, `receive`, or `reply`.
rows.title_zh: 新条目作用的流量方向：`send`、`receive` 或 `reply`。

rows.desc_en: Whether to add the entry to the `allow` or `block` list.
rows.title_zh: 将条目加入 `allow` 还是 `block` 名单。

rows.desc_en: Bearer token for authentication, sent as `Bearer <api_key>`. Keep the key secret.
rows.title_zh: 用于鉴权的 Bearer 令牌，格式为 `Bearer <api_key>`。请妥善保密。

rows.src_en: Email address or domain to add.
rows.desc_en: Email address or domain to add to the list.
rows.title_zh: 要加入名单的邮箱地址或域名。

rows.desc_en: Optional free-text note recording why the entry was added.
rows.title_zh: 可选的自由文本备注，记录添加该条目的原因。

rows.src_en: Email address or domain of list entry.
rows.desc_en: The email address or domain of the list entry.
rows.title_zh: 名单条目的邮箱地址或域名。

rows.desc_en: ID of the organization the list entry belongs to.
rows.title_zh: 名单条目所属的组织 ID。

rows.desc_en: Free-text reason recorded when the entry was added.
rows.title_zh: 添加该条目时记录的自由文本原因。

rows.desc_en: Traffic direction the entry governs: `send`, `receive`, or `reply`.
rows.title_zh: 条目作用的流量方向：`send`、`receive` 或 `reply`。

rows.desc_en: Whether this is an `allow` or `block` list entry.
rows.title_zh: 该条目属于 `allow` 还是 `block` 名单。

rows.desc_en: Whether the entry matches a single `email` address or an entire `domain`.
rows.title_zh: 条目匹配单个 `email` 地址还是整个 `domain`。

rows.src_en: Time at which entry was created.
rows.desc_en: When the resource was created.
rows.title_zh: 资源创建时间。

rows.src_en: Whether the entry is read-only and cannot be deleted via the API.
rows.desc_en: When true, the entry is system-managed and cannot be deleted through the API.
rows.title_zh: 为 true 时，条目由系统管理，不能通过 API 删除。

rows.desc_en: Machine-readable error name identifying the validation failure.
rows.title_zh: 标识本次校验失败的机器可读错误名。

rows.desc_en: Details of the validation problems with the query parameters.
rows.title_zh: 查询参数校验问题的明细。

rows.desc_en: List resources with cursor pagination. This operationId is shared by three endpoints: list threads, list drafts, and list allow/block list entries. Supports time/label filters where applicable; iterate with `next_page_token` to walk all pages.
rows.title_zh: 分页列出资源（基于游标）。该 operationId 由三个端点共用：列出对话、列出草稿、列出允许/拦截名单条目。在适用处支持时间与标签筛选；通过 `next_page_token` 翻页可遍历全部结果。

rows.desc_en: Maximum number of items to return in this page.
rows.title_zh: 本页返回的最大条目数。

rows.desc_en: Pagination cursor. Pass the `next_page_token` from the previous response to fetch the next page; omit for the first page.
rows.title_zh: 分页游标。传入上一次响应的 `next_page_token` 以取下一页；首页可不传。

rows.desc_en: Restrict results to items carrying all of these labels.
rows.title_zh: 仅返回带有全部这些标签的条目。

rows.desc_en: Only return items with a timestamp before this moment.
rows.title_zh: 仅返回时间戳早于该时刻的条目。

rows.desc_en: Only return items with a timestamp after this moment.
rows.title_zh: 仅返回时间戳晚于该时刻的条目。

rows.desc_en: When true, return items in ascending time order instead of the default newest-first.
rows.title_zh: 为 true 时按时间升序返回，而非默认的最新优先。

rows.desc_en: When true, include items labeled spam in the results.
rows.title_zh: 为 true 时在结果中包含被标记为垃圾邮件（spam）的条目。

rows.desc_en: When true, include items labeled blocked in the results.
rows.title_zh: 为 true 时在结果中包含被标记为拦截（blocked）的条目。

rows.desc_en: When true, include items from unauthenticated senders in the results.
rows.title_zh: 为 true 时在结果中包含来自未通过认证发件人的条目。

rows.desc_en: When true, include items in trash in the results.
rows.title_zh: 为 true 时在结果中包含回收站（trash）内的条目。

rows.desc_en: Bearer token for authentication, sent as `Bearer <api_key>`. Keep the key secret.
rows.title_zh: 用于鉴权的 Bearer 令牌，格式为 `Bearer <api_key>`。请妥善保密。

rows.desc_en: Number of items returned in this page.
rows.title_zh: 本页返回的条目数。

rows.desc_en: The limit that was applied to this page.
rows.title_zh: 本页实际生效的数量上限。

rows.desc_en: Cursor for the next page; pass it back as `page_token`. Absent or empty when there are no more pages.
rows.title_zh: 下一页的游标；作为 `page_token` 回传。无更多页时缺省或为空。

rows.desc_en: The page of threads, newest first.
rows.title_zh: 本页对话列表，最新优先。

rows.desc_en: ID of the inbox that owns the thread.
rows.title_zh: 拥有该对话的收件箱 ID。

rows.desc_en: ID of the thread, usable as the path parameter for thread operations.
rows.title_zh: 对话 ID，可用作对话相关操作的路径参数。

rows.desc_en: Labels applied to the thread.
rows.title_zh: 应用于该对话的标签。

rows.desc_en: When the last message was sent or received.
rows.title_zh: 最近一次发送或接收消息的时间。

rows.desc_en: When the last message was received.
rows.title_zh: 最近一次接收消息的时间。

rows.desc_en: When the last message was sent.
rows.title_zh: 最近一次发送消息的时间。

rows.desc_en: Distinct sender addresses in the thread.
rows.title_zh: 对话中出现过的不同发件人地址。

rows.desc_en: Distinct recipient addresses in the thread.
rows.title_zh: 对话中出现过的不同收件人地址。

rows.desc_en: Subject of the thread.
rows.title_zh: 对话主题。

rows.desc_en: Plain-text snippet of the last message.
rows.title_zh: 最后一条消息的纯文本短摘要。

rows.desc_en: Attachments present in the thread.
rows.title_zh: 对话中包含的附件。

rows.desc_en: ID of the attachment, used as the path parameter for the get-attachment endpoint.
rows.title_zh: 附件 ID，作为获取附件端点的路径参数。

rows.desc_en: Original filename of the attachment.
rows.title_zh: 附件的原始文件名。

rows.desc_en: Attachment size in bytes.
rows.title_zh: 附件大小（字节）。

rows.desc_en: MIME content type of the attachment (e.g. `application/pdf`).
rows.title_zh: 附件的 MIME 内容类型（如 `application/pdf`）。

rows.desc_en: How the attachment is presented: `inline` (rendered within the body, e.g. an embedded image) or `attachment` (a downloadable file).
rows.title_zh: 附件呈现方式：`inline`（随正文内嵌，如内嵌图片）或 `attachment`（可下载的文件）。

rows.desc_en: Content-ID used to reference an inline attachment from within the HTML body (via `cid:`).
rows.title_zh: Content-ID，用于在 HTML 正文中以 `cid:` 引用内嵌附件。

rows.desc_en: ID of the most recent message in the thread.
rows.title_zh: 对话中最新一条消息的 ID。

rows.desc_en: Number of messages in the thread.
rows.title_zh: 对话中的消息数量。

rows.desc_en: Total size of the thread in bytes.
rows.title_zh: 对话的总大小（字节）。

rows.desc_en: When the thread was last updated.
rows.title_zh: 对话最后更新时间。

rows.desc_en: When the thread was created.
rows.title_zh: 对话创建时间。

rows.desc_en: Machine-readable error name identifying the failure.
rows.title_zh: 标识此次失败的机器可读错误名。

rows.desc_en: Human-readable description of the error.
rows.title_zh: 面向人类的错误描述。

rows.desc_en: Get attachment metadata together with a time-limited presigned download URL. Shared by two endpoints: fetch an attachment from a draft (`draft_id`) or from a thread (`thread_id`), in both cases by `attachment_id`.
rows.title_zh: 获取附件元数据及一个限时的预签名下载链接。由两个端点共用：从草稿（`draft_id`）或从对话（`thread_id`）按 `attachment_id` 获取附件。

rows.desc_en: ID of the draft that contains the attachment. (Draft attachment endpoint only.)
rows.title_zh: 包含该附件的草稿 ID。（仅草稿附件端点）

rows.desc_en: ID of the attachment to fetch. Obtain it from the `attachment_id` field of a message/thread/draft attachment.
rows.title_zh: 要获取的附件 ID。可从消息/对话/草稿附件的 `attachment_id` 字段获得。

rows.desc_en: Bearer token for authentication, sent as `Bearer <api_key>`. Keep the key secret.
rows.title_zh: 用于鉴权的 Bearer 令牌，格式为 `Bearer <api_key>`。请妥善保密。

rows.desc_en: ID of the attachment.
rows.title_zh: 附件 ID。

rows.desc_en: Original filename of the attachment.
rows.title_zh: 附件的原始文件名。

rows.desc_en: Attachment size in bytes.
rows.title_zh: 附件大小（字节）。

rows.desc_en: MIME content type of the attachment.
rows.title_zh: 附件的 MIME 内容类型。

rows.desc_en: How the attachment is presented: `inline` or `attachment`.
rows.title_zh: 附件呈现方式：`inline` 或 `attachment`。

rows.desc_en: Content-ID for referencing an inline attachment from the HTML body.
rows.title_zh: Content-ID，用于在 HTML 正文中引用内嵌附件。

rows.desc_en: Time-limited presigned URL to download the attachment binary. Fetch the file before `expires_at`.
rows.title_zh: 限时预签名下载链接，用于下载附件二进制内容。请在 `expires_at` 之前完成下载。

rows.src_en: Time at which the download URL expires.
rows.desc_en: When the download URL expires and stops working.
rows.title_zh: 下载链接失效的时间。

rows.desc_en: Machine-readable error name identifying the failure.
rows.title_zh: 标识此次失败的机器可读错误名。

rows.desc_en: Human-readable description of the error.
rows.title_zh: 面向人类的错误描述。

rows.desc_en: Get attachment metadata together with a time-limited presigned download URL. Shared by two endpoints: fetch an attachment from a draft (`draft_id`) or from a thread (`thread_id`), in both cases by `attachment_id`.
rows.title_zh: 获取附件元数据及一个限时的预签名下载链接。由两个端点共用：从草稿（`draft_id`）或从对话（`thread_id`）按 `attachment_id` 获取附件。

rows.desc_en: ID of the thread that contains the attachment. (Thread attachment endpoint only.)
rows.title_zh: 包含该附件的对话 ID。（仅对话附件端点）

rows.desc_en: ID of the attachment to fetch. Obtain it from the `attachment_id` field of a message/thread/draft attachment.
rows.title_zh: 要获取的附件 ID。可从消息/对话/草稿附件的 `attachment_id` 字段获得。

rows.desc_en: Bearer token for authentication, sent as `Bearer <api_key>`. Keep the key secret.
rows.title_zh: 用于鉴权的 Bearer 令牌，格式为 `Bearer <api_key>`。请妥善保密。

rows.desc_en: ID of the attachment.
rows.title_zh: 附件 ID。

rows.desc_en: Original filename of the attachment.
rows.title_zh: 附件的原始文件名。

rows.desc_en: Attachment size in bytes.
rows.title_zh: 附件大小（字节）。

rows.desc_en: MIME content type of the attachment.
rows.title_zh: 附件的 MIME 内容类型。

rows.desc_en: How the attachment is presented: `inline` or `attachment`.
rows.title_zh: 附件呈现方式：`inline` 或 `attachment`。

rows.desc_en: Content-ID for referencing an inline attachment from the HTML body.
rows.title_zh: Content-ID，用于在 HTML 正文中引用内嵌附件。

rows.desc_en: Time-limited presigned URL to download the attachment binary. Fetch the file before `expires_at`.
rows.title_zh: 限时预签名下载链接，用于下载附件二进制内容。请在 `expires_at` 之前完成下载。

rows.src_en: Time at which the download URL expires.
rows.desc_en: When the download URL expires and stops working.
rows.title_zh: 下载链接失效的时间。

rows.desc_en: Machine-readable error name identifying the failure.
rows.title_zh: 标识此次失败的机器可读错误名。

rows.desc_en: Human-readable description of the error.
rows.title_zh: 面向人类的错误描述。

rows.desc_en: Query email delivery metrics aggregated into time buckets. Results are grouped by event type (sent, delivered, bounced, etc.) over the requested time window and bucket period.
rows.title_zh: 查询邮件投递指标，按时间桶聚合。结果按事件类型（sent、delivered、bounced 等）分组，覆盖请求指定的时间窗口与桶周期。

rows.desc_en: Which metric event types to include, e.g. `message.sent`, `message.delivered`, `message.bounced`. Omit to query the default set.
rows.title_zh: 要纳入统计的指标事件类型，如 `message.sent`、`message.delivered`、`message.bounced`。不传则查询默认集合。

rows.desc_en: Start of the time window to query (inclusive).
rows.title_zh: 查询时间窗口的起点（含）。

rows.desc_en: End of the time window to query (exclusive).
rows.title_zh: 查询时间窗口的终点（不含）。

rows.desc_en: Width of each time bucket, expressed as a number of seconds. Determines the granularity of the aggregation.
rows.title_zh: 每个时间桶的宽度，以秒数表示，决定聚合的粒度。

rows.desc_en: Maximum number of time buckets to return.
rows.title_zh: 返回的时间桶最大数量。

rows.desc_en: When true, return buckets in descending time order (newest first).
rows.title_zh: 为 true 时按时间降序返回桶（最新优先）。

rows.desc_en: Bearer token for authentication, sent as `Bearer <api_key>`. Keep the key secret.
rows.title_zh: 用于鉴权的 Bearer 令牌，格式为 `Bearer <api_key>`。请妥善保密。

rows.desc_en: Machine-readable error name identifying the validation failure.
rows.title_zh: 标识本次校验失败的机器可读错误名。

rows.desc_en: Details of the validation problems with the query parameters.
rows.title_zh: 查询参数校验问题的明细。

rows.desc_en: Fetch a single resource by its ID. This operationId is shared by three endpoints: get a thread (with its full message list) by `thread_id`, get a draft by `draft_id`, and get one allow/block list entry by `direction`/`type`/`entry`. The path determines which resource and response shape you receive.
rows.title_zh: 按 ID 获取单个资源。该 operationId 由三个端点共用：按 `thread_id` 获取对话（含完整消息列表）、按 `draft_id` 获取草稿、按 `direction`/`type`/`entry` 获取单条允许/拦截名单条目。具体取哪种资源及返回结构由请求路径决定。

rows.desc_en: Which traffic direction the list entry governs: `send` (your outbound), `receive` (inbound to you), or `reply`. Combined with `type` it selects exactly one list.
rows.title_zh: 名单条目作用的流量方向：`send`（出站）、`receive`（入站）或 `reply`（回复）。与 `type` 组合可精确定位一份名单。

rows.desc_en: Whether to address the allow list or the block list. `allow` permits the entry; `block` denies it. Combined with `direction` it selects exactly one list.
rows.title_zh: 操作允许名单还是拦截名单：`allow` 放行、`block` 拦截。与 `direction` 组合可精确定位一份名单。

rows.desc_en: The exact email address or domain identifying the list entry to fetch.
rows.title_zh: 标识要获取的名单条目的邮箱地址或域名（需精确匹配）。

rows.desc_en: Bearer token for authentication, sent as `Bearer <api_key>`. Keep the key secret; never log it in plaintext.
rows.title_zh: 用于鉴权的 Bearer 令牌，格式为 `Bearer <api_key>`。请妥善保密，切勿明文记录。

rows.src_en: Email address or domain of list entry.
rows.desc_en: The email address or domain of the list entry.
rows.title_zh: 名单条目的邮箱地址或域名。

rows.desc_en: ID of the organization the list entry belongs to.
rows.title_zh: 名单条目所属的组织 ID。

rows.desc_en: Free-text reason recorded when the entry was added.
rows.title_zh: 添加该条目时记录的自由文本原因。

rows.desc_en: Traffic direction the entry governs: `send`, `receive`, or `reply`.
rows.title_zh: 条目作用的流量方向：`send`、`receive` 或 `reply`。

rows.desc_en: Whether this is an `allow` or `block` list entry.
rows.title_zh: 该条目属于 `allow` 还是 `block` 名单。

rows.desc_en: Whether the entry matches a single `email` address or an entire `domain`.
rows.title_zh: 条目匹配单个 `email` 地址还是整个 `domain`。

rows.src_en: Time at which entry was created.
rows.desc_en: When the resource was created.
rows.title_zh: 资源创建时间。

rows.src_en: Whether the entry is read-only and cannot be deleted via the API.
rows.desc_en: When true, the entry is system-managed and cannot be deleted through the API.
rows.title_zh: 为 true 时，条目由系统管理，不能通过 API 删除。

rows.desc_en: Machine-readable error name identifying the failure.
rows.title_zh: 标识此次失败的机器可读错误名。

rows.desc_en: Human-readable description of the error.
rows.title_zh: 面向人类的错误描述。

rows.desc_en: Delete a resource by its ID. Shared by two endpoints: delete a thread (moves it to trash, or permanently removes it when already trashed or when `permanent=true`) and delete one allow/block list entry. Read-only system entries cannot be deleted.
rows.title_zh: 按 ID 删除资源。由两个端点共用：删除对话（移入回收站；若已在回收站或 `permanent=true` 则永久删除）、删除单条允许/拦截名单条目。只读的系统条目无法删除。

rows.desc_en: Traffic direction of the list entry to delete: `send`, `receive`, or `reply`.
rows.title_zh: 要删除的名单条目的流量方向：`send`、`receive` 或 `reply`。

rows.desc_en: Whether the entry is on the `allow` or `block` list.
rows.title_zh: 条目位于 `allow` 还是 `block` 名单。

rows.desc_en: The exact email address or domain of the list entry to delete. System (read-only) entries cannot be removed.
rows.title_zh: 要删除的名单条目的邮箱地址或域名（需精确匹配）。系统（只读）条目不可删除。

rows.desc_en: Bearer token for authentication, sent as `Bearer <api_key>`. Keep the key secret.
rows.title_zh: 用于鉴权的 Bearer 令牌，格式为 `Bearer <api_key>`。请妥善保密。

rows.desc_en: Machine-readable error name identifying the failure.
rows.title_zh: 标识此次失败的机器可读错误名。

rows.desc_en: Human-readable description of the error.
rows.title_zh: 面向人类的错误描述。

rows.desc_en: List resources with cursor pagination. This operationId is shared by three endpoints: list threads, list drafts, and list allow/block list entries. Supports time/label filters where applicable; iterate with `next_page_token` to walk all pages.
rows.title_zh: 分页列出资源（基于游标）。该 operationId 由三个端点共用：列出对话、列出草稿、列出允许/拦截名单条目。在适用处支持时间与标签筛选；通过 `next_page_token` 翻页可遍历全部结果。

rows.desc_en: Maximum number of items to return in this page.
rows.title_zh: 本页返回的最大条目数。

rows.desc_en: Pagination cursor. Pass the `next_page_token` from the previous response to fetch the next page; omit for the first page.
rows.title_zh: 分页游标。传入上一次响应的 `next_page_token` 以取下一页；首页可不传。

rows.desc_en: Restrict results to items carrying all of these labels.
rows.title_zh: 仅返回带有全部这些标签的条目。

rows.desc_en: Only return items with a timestamp before this moment.
rows.title_zh: 仅返回时间戳早于该时刻的条目。

rows.desc_en: Only return items with a timestamp after this moment.
rows.title_zh: 仅返回时间戳晚于该时刻的条目。

rows.desc_en: When true, return items in ascending time order instead of the default newest-first.
rows.title_zh: 为 true 时按时间升序返回，而非默认的最新优先。

rows.desc_en: Bearer token for authentication, sent as `Bearer <api_key>`. Keep the key secret.
rows.title_zh: 用于鉴权的 Bearer 令牌，格式为 `Bearer <api_key>`。请妥善保密。

rows.desc_en: Number of items returned in this page.
rows.title_zh: 本页返回的条目数。

rows.desc_en: The limit that was applied to this page.
rows.title_zh: 本页实际生效的数量上限。

rows.desc_en: Cursor for the next page; pass it back as `page_token`. Absent or empty when there are no more pages.
rows.title_zh: 下一页的游标；作为 `page_token` 回传。无更多页时缺省或为空。

rows.desc_en: The page of drafts, most recently updated first.
rows.title_zh: 本页草稿列表，按最近更新优先。

rows.desc_en: ID of the inbox that owns the draft.
rows.title_zh: 拥有该草稿的收件箱 ID。

rows.desc_en: ID of the draft, usable as the path parameter for draft operations.
rows.title_zh: 草稿 ID，可用作草稿相关操作的路径参数。

rows.desc_en: Labels applied to the draft.
rows.title_zh: 应用于该草稿的标签。

rows.desc_en: Primary recipient addresses of the draft.
rows.title_zh: 草稿的主要收件人地址。

rows.desc_en: CC recipient addresses of the draft.
rows.title_zh: 草稿的抄送收件人地址。

rows.desc_en: BCC recipient addresses of the draft.
rows.title_zh: 草稿的密送收件人地址。

rows.desc_en: Subject of the draft.
rows.title_zh: 草稿主题。

rows.desc_en: Plain-text snippet of the draft body.
rows.title_zh: 草稿正文的纯文本短摘要。

rows.desc_en: Attachments present in the draft.
rows.title_zh: 草稿中包含的附件。

rows.desc_en: ID of the attachment, used as the path parameter for the get-attachment endpoint.
rows.title_zh: 附件 ID，作为获取附件端点的路径参数。

rows.desc_en: Original filename of the attachment.
rows.title_zh: 附件的原始文件名。

rows.desc_en: Attachment size in bytes.
rows.title_zh: 附件大小（字节）。

rows.desc_en: MIME content type of the attachment (e.g. `application/pdf`).
rows.title_zh: 附件的 MIME 内容类型（如 `application/pdf`）。

rows.desc_en: How the attachment is presented: `inline` (rendered within the body, e.g. an embedded image) or `attachment` (a downloadable file).
rows.title_zh: 附件呈现方式：`inline`（随正文内嵌，如内嵌图片）或 `attachment`（可下载的文件）。

rows.desc_en: Content-ID used to reference an inline attachment from within the HTML body (via `cid:`).
rows.title_zh: Content-ID，用于在 HTML 正文中以 `cid:` 引用内嵌附件。

rows.desc_en: ID of the message the draft replies to, if any.
rows.title_zh: 草稿所回复的目标消息 ID（如有）。

rows.desc_en: Scheduled-send state of the draft: `scheduled`, `sending`, or `failed`.
rows.title_zh: 草稿的定时发送状态：`scheduled`、`sending` 或 `failed`。

rows.desc_en: When the draft is scheduled to be sent.
rows.title_zh: 草稿计划发送的时间。

rows.desc_en: When the draft was last updated.
rows.title_zh: 草稿最后更新时间。

rows.desc_en: Machine-readable error name identifying the failure.
rows.title_zh: 标识此次失败的机器可读错误名。

rows.desc_en: Human-readable description of the error.
rows.title_zh: 面向人类的错误描述。

rows.desc_en: Fetch a single resource by its ID. This operationId is shared by three endpoints: get a thread (with its full message list) by `thread_id`, get a draft by `draft_id`, and get one allow/block list entry by `direction`/`type`/`entry`. The path determines which resource and response shape you receive.
rows.title_zh: 按 ID 获取单个资源。该 operationId 由三个端点共用：按 `thread_id` 获取对话（含完整消息列表）、按 `draft_id` 获取草稿、按 `direction`/`type`/`entry` 获取单条允许/拦截名单条目。具体取哪种资源及返回结构由请求路径决定。

rows.desc_en: ID of the draft to fetch. Obtain it from the `draft_id` field of a list-drafts result or a create-draft response.
rows.title_zh: 要获取的草稿 ID。可从列出草稿的结果或创建草稿响应的 `draft_id` 字段获得。

rows.desc_en: Bearer token for authentication, sent as `Bearer <api_key>`. Keep the key secret; never log it in plaintext.
rows.title_zh: 用于鉴权的 Bearer 令牌，格式为 `Bearer <api_key>`。请妥善保密，切勿明文记录。

rows.desc_en: ID of the inbox that owns this resource.
rows.title_zh: 拥有该资源的收件箱 ID。

rows.desc_en: ID of the draft, usable as the path parameter for draft operations.
rows.title_zh: 草稿 ID，可用作草稿相关操作的路径参数。

rows.desc_en: Caller-supplied client ID echoed back, useful for correlating the draft with your own records.
rows.title_zh: 回显的调用方自定义 client ID，便于将草稿与你自己的记录关联。

rows.desc_en: Labels currently applied, including both system labels and your custom labels.
rows.title_zh: 当前应用的标签，含系统标签与自定义标签。

rows.desc_en: Reply-To addresses recipients should reply to instead of the From address.
rows.title_zh: 回复目标地址，收件人应回复到此处而非 From 地址。

rows.desc_en: Primary recipient addresses.
rows.title_zh: 主要收件人地址。

rows.desc_en: CC (carbon copy) recipient addresses.
rows.title_zh: 抄送（CC）收件人地址。

rows.desc_en: BCC (blind carbon copy) recipient addresses, not visible to other recipients.
rows.title_zh: 密送（BCC）收件人地址，其他收件人不可见。

rows.desc_en: Subject line.
rows.title_zh: 主题。

rows.desc_en: Short plain-text snippet of the content, for list-style display.
rows.title_zh: 内容的纯文本短摘要，用于列表展示。

rows.desc_en: Plain-text body.
rows.title_zh: 纯文本正文。

rows.desc_en: HTML body.
rows.title_zh: HTML 正文。

rows.desc_en: Attachments belonging to this resource.
rows.title_zh: 该资源包含的附件。

rows.desc_en: ID of the attachment, used as the path parameter for the get-attachment endpoint.
rows.title_zh: 附件 ID，作为获取附件端点的路径参数。

rows.desc_en: Original filename of the attachment.
rows.title_zh: 附件的原始文件名。

rows.desc_en: Attachment size in bytes.
rows.title_zh: 附件大小（字节）。

rows.desc_en: MIME content type of the attachment (e.g. `application/pdf`).
rows.title_zh: 附件的 MIME 内容类型（如 `application/pdf`）。

rows.desc_en: How the attachment is presented: `inline` (rendered within the body, e.g. an embedded image) or `attachment` (a downloadable file).
rows.title_zh: 附件呈现方式：`inline`（随正文内嵌，如内嵌图片）或 `attachment`（可下载的文件）。

rows.desc_en: Content-ID used to reference an inline attachment from within the HTML body (via `cid:`).
rows.title_zh: Content-ID，用于在 HTML 正文中以 `cid:` 引用内嵌附件。

rows.desc_en: ID of the message this draft/thread is replying to, if any.
rows.title_zh: 本草稿/对话所回复的目标消息 ID（如有）。

rows.src_en: IDs of previous messages in thread.
rows.desc_en: IDs of earlier messages in the thread, forming the reply chain.
rows.title_zh: 对话中较早消息的 ID 列表，构成回复链。

rows.desc_en: Scheduled-send state of the draft: `scheduled` (queued for `send_at`), `sending`, or `failed`. Absent for drafts with no scheduled send.
rows.title_zh: 草稿的定时发送状态：`scheduled`（已排期到 `send_at`）、`sending`、`failed`。未设定时发送的草稿无此字段。

rows.desc_en: When the draft is scheduled to be sent.
rows.title_zh: 草稿计划发送的时间。

rows.desc_en: When the resource was last updated.
rows.title_zh: 资源最后更新时间。

rows.src_en: Time at which draft was created.
rows.desc_en: When the resource was created.
rows.title_zh: 资源创建时间。

rows.desc_en: Machine-readable error name identifying the failure.
rows.title_zh: 标识此次失败的机器可读错误名。

rows.desc_en: Human-readable description of the error.
rows.title_zh: 面向人类的错误描述。
